projects.raw_text:
Substrate Integrated Waveguide based Antenna using HFSS software.

Jan 2020 – Present


Associated with Maharaja Agrasen Institute Of Technology

Design and fabrication of microstrip patch antenna for RFID application using HFSS software.

Aug 2019 – Dec 2019


Associated with Maharaja Agrasen Institute Of Technology

DATA ACQUISITION AND GRAPHICAL VISUALIZATION ON MATLAB

Jun 2019 – Jul 2019

Associated with Solid State Physics Laboratory , DRDO, Delhi , India

I have created a code, which reads the automatically generated files of *.id 
extension. The code can then be used to plot the V-I Characteristics for each of 
Vgs of the data present in the data file.
A Graphical User Interface (GUI) has also been created using GUIDE tool in 
MATLAB so that the user can access the file and visualize the plot generated more 
easily.
Plots of multiple files can be superimposed over one another so that the user can 
compare the plots and have better understanding of the data plotted.
Any number of files can be selected and the plots can be given any colour of 
user’s choice.

Mapping Your Surroundings Using MATLAB and Arduino

Feb 2019 – May 2019
